title: orobanche corymbosa subsp. mutabilis
intro: Orobanche corymbosa subsp. mutabilis is a parasitic plant species, belonging to the broomrape family (Orobanchaceae), that obtains its nutrients by connecting to the roots of its host plants. The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine to treat various health issues, including fever, cough, and digestive problems, due to its medicinal properties. The health benefits of Orobanche corymbosa subsp. mutabilis include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which may help to reduce inflammation and combat infections. In herbal preparations, the plant is typically dried and used as a decoction or infusion, although more research is needed to fully understand its potential uses and applications.
